name: pi-keel
description: Engineering skills and security system for pi — the keel that keeps AI coding steady

scripts.test: npx tsx scripts/validate-skills.ts && npx tsc --noEmit && npx tsx tests/security-gate/taxonomy.test.ts && npx tsx tests/security-gate/plan-gate.test.ts && npx tsx tests/security-gate/permission-engine.test.ts && npx tsx tests/security-gate/tool-gate.test.ts && npx tsx tests/security-gate/path.test.ts && npx tsx tests/security-gate/config.test.ts && npx tsx tests/security-gate/phase.test.ts && npx tsx tests/security-gate/index.test.ts && npx tsx tests/security-gate/integration.test.ts
